text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 33 

HIVAIDS_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS) First Ever 
Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the human 
immunodeficiency virus and/or acquired immunodeficiency syndrome
